name: distObjMemberBlueprint::SetAttribute
title: distObjMemberBlueprint::SetAttribute
description: Sets an attribute at the member blueprint.
The attribute type must correspond to the overload that is called. Otherwise an error code will be returned. Integer types will be converted if they fall in the range of the attribute type.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Fully qualified name of the attribute.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
